problem_summary: Petals Hair & Beauty Westport has built an exceptional online reputation with 312 Google reviews at 4.8 stars, but the current website is not structured to convert that trust into consistent new bookings. Navigation is cluttered, the contact form and booking pathway are difficult to locate, and there is no content presence to capture organic search demand from tourists and seasonal visitors searching for services in Westport. Targeted improvements to site structure, local content, and on-page SEO would bring the website in line with the quality of the business it represents.
recommended_solution: A two-phase Local SEO Starter package covering an immediate structural and navigation fix to surface the booking pathway and contact form, followed by a content and on-page SEO build targeting high-intent local and seasonal searches relevant to Westport and Co. Mayo.
scope_of_work: Phase 1: Restructure site navigation and reposition the booking CTA and contact form to a prominent, above-the-fold location on the homepage, with priority given to the mobile experience, and audit and resolve identified broken elements to restore a professional user journey.

Phase 2: Produce three to four SEO-optimised blog posts targeting high-intent local and seasonal searches such as bridal hair Westport, hair salon Westport, and special occasion styling Mayo, to begin capturing organic traffic from tourists and seasonal visitors.

Phase 2: Review and enrich service pages with descriptive copy that includes location references and specific service detail, and implement LocalBusiness schema markup to strengthen local search signals for Westport and surrounding areas.
expected_outcomes: Surfacing the booking CTA and contact form above the fold should improve the rate at which mobile visitors convert into enquiries and confirmed appointments without needing to search the site.

Adding three to four locally targeted content pieces is likely to increase organic visibility for seasonal and tourist-driven searches that the site is not currently capturing, supporting a steady flow of new high-intent visitors over time.

Enriched service pages combined with LocalBusiness schema markup should improve how the site appears in local search results, making it more likely that Petals surfaces for relevant searches across Westport and Co. Mayo.
next_steps: Schedule a 20-minute walkthrough call to confirm what customisation Phorest allows for homepage layout and navigation, agree on priority content topics for Phase 2, and finalise scope before work begins.
risks_if_delayed: Each month without a visible booking pathway and locally targeted content is a period during which high-intent visitors, including tourists actively searching for salons in Westport, are reaching the site but not converting. Given the strength of the existing Google reputation, the gap between what the business has earned and what the website is currently delivering is a straightforward one to close.
